## Scope check

- [ ] Changes stay scoped to one coherent slice.
- [ ] I extended an existing source of truth instead of creating a parallel surface.
- [ ] I removed replaced or dead surfaces when applicable.

## Duplication check

- [ ] I searched for existing sections, content, or files covering the same idea.
- [ ] I did not introduce parallel sources of truth.
- [ ] I did not add duplicate lockfiles or package manager metadata.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] I checked public copy for forbidden terms and stale branding.

## Conflict review

- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main`, or conflicts were reviewed and resolved explicitly.
- [ ] No unrelated WIP was added while resolving conflicts.
